title: IGCSE Economics Key Definitions
subject: Economics
summary: Short-answer practice for foundational economics definitions.
learning_objectives: Recall core IGCSE Economics definitions accurately.
Use exam command words to frame concise short answers.

items.answer: The next best alternative forgone when a choice is made.
items.explanation: The definition should refer to the alternative that is given up.

items.answer: The basic economic problem that resources are limited while wants are unlimited.
items.explanation: Good answers mention both limited resources and unlimited wants.

items.answer: Money acts as a medium of exchange, allowing goods and services to be traded without barter.
items.explanation: Other valid functions include store of value, unit of account, and standard of deferred payment.
